{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Thousand Eyes
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Thousand Eyes]] is an [[Elder]] cult.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
